title: Lights of Old Broadway
writer: Laurence Eyre, Joseph Farnham, Carey Wilson
actors: Marion Davies, Conrad Nagel, Frank Currier
plot: Lights of Old Broadway (1925) is a drama film directed by Monta Bell, produced by William Randolph Hearst's Cosmopolitan Productions, and released by Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer. The film stars Marion Davies and Conrad Nagel, and is an ad...
